menstrual.label: Fase Menstrual
menstrual.description: Enfócate en movimientos suaves y restaurativos para aliviar cólicos y respetar la baja energía.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions: Start on your hands and knees with your wrists directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Inhale as you arch your back, dropping your belly towards the mat and lifting your head and tailbone towards the ceiling (Cow Pose).
Exhale as you round your spine towards the ceiling, tucking your chin towards your chest and drawing your belly button towards your spine (Cat Pose).
Repeat this movement for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Child’s Pose
instructions: Start on your hands and knees with your knees wider than hip-width apart and your big toes touching.
Sit back onto your heels and reach your arms forward, resting your forehead on the mat.
Relax your entire body and breathe deeply into your back.
Hold this pose for the desired amount of time.

exercises.name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions: Sit on the floor with your legs extended straight in front of you.
Inhale and lengthen your spine.
Exhale and fold forward from your hips, reaching your hands towards your feet.
Hold onto your shins, ankles, or feet, depending on your flexibility.
Relax your head and neck and breathe deeply into the stretch.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
instructions: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended.
Bring your right knee towards your chest and cross it over your body to the left side.
Extend your right arm out to the side and look towards your right hand.
Hold the stretch for a few breaths, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilts
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Flatten your back against the floor by tightening your abdominal muscles and bending your pelvis up slightly.
Hold for up to 10 seconds.
Release and repeat.

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and your head supported.
Place one hand on your upper chest and the other just below your rib cage.
Breathe in slowly through your nose without moving your chest.
Breathe out through pursed lips, tightening your stomach muscles.

follicular.label: Fase Folicular
follicular.description: A medida que sube el estrógeno, aumenta la intensidad con ejercicios de fuerza y resistencia.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower hips back and down as if sitting in a chair.
Keep chest up and knees tracking over toes.
Return to standing.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent and feet flat on floor.
Lift hips toward ceiling, squeezing glutes at the top.
Lower back down with control.
Keep core engaged throughout.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunges
instructions: Stand tall with feet together.
Step one foot back and lower knee toward ground.
Keep front knee behind toe and torso upright.
Push off back foot to return to start.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Ups
instructions: Place hands on a raised surface like a bench or sturdy chair.
Walk feet back into plank position.
Lower chest toward the surface.
Push back up to starting position.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back with arms extended toward ceiling and legs in table-top position.
Lower opposite arm and leg toward floor without letting back arch.
Return to center and switch sides.

exercises.name: Standing Side Bends
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Slide one hand down the side of your leg while reaching other arm over head.
Feel the stretch in your side.
Return to center and switch sides.

ovulatory.label: Fase Ovulatoria
ovulatory.description: Tu energía está al máximo. Es el momento perfecto para HIIT y fuerza máxima.

exercises.name: Squats
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower hips back and down.
Drive back up explosively.
Add weights for increased intensity.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold weights in front of thighs.
Hing at hips, keeping back flat and legs slightly bent.
Lower weights toward floor.
Squeeze glutes to return to standing.

exercises.name: Step-Ups
instructions: Place one foot on a sturdy bench or box.
Drive through the heel to lift your body up.
Step back down with control.
Alternate legs or complete all reps on one side.

exercises.name: Push-Ups
instructions: Start in plank position.
Lower chest to floor keeping elbows at 45 degrees.
Push back up to start.
Modify on knees if necessary.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in plank position.
Drive knees toward chest in alternating rhythm.
Keep core steady and hips level.
Move as quickly as possible.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Start standing with feet together.
Jump feet apart while raising arms overhead.
Jump back to start.
Repeat continuously.

luteal.label: Fase Lútea
luteal.description: El metabolismo aumenta pero la resistencia baja. Prioriza ejercicios de fuerza controlada y bajo impacto.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold weight at chest height.
Perform a squat keeping chest up.
Elbows should track inside knees.
Focus on form and control.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
instructions: Lean back against a wall.
Slide down until thighs are parallel to floor.
Hold position.
Keep lower back pressed against wall.

exercises.name: Standing March
instructions: Stand tall.
Lift one knee toward chest.
Alternate legs in a marching rhythm.
Engage core for balance.

exercises.name: Side Leg Raises
instructions: Stand or lie on side.
Lift top leg straight up.
Lower with control.
Repeat on both sides.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
instructions: Start on hands and knees.
Extend opposite arm and leg straight out.
Hold for a second.
Return to start and switch sides.

exercises.name: Low Impact Cardio Walk
instructions: Walk in place or around room.
Maintain a brisk pace.
Swing arms for extra calorie burn.
Keep impact low on joints.
